summary: Testing AI Offer Module Phase 1 MVP - Complete. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working - AI помощ button visible on draft offers, multi-line input dialog works, AI proposals display with editable pricing fields, provider badges (Rule/LLM), hourly rate info, internal price hints, recalculate button, and batch add to offer functionality.

issues: React hydration warnings in console (span child of tbody/tr/th/td) - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/extra-works/ai-fast returns fast rule-based proposals with hourly_info including worker_type and min_applied - WORKING
POST /api/extra-works/ai-refine returns LLM-enhanced proposals with internal_price_hint when historical data exists - WORKING
Frontend AI dialog supports multi-line input with 'Добави ред' button
Frontend shows editable proposal fields: Описание, Мярка, К-во, Мат. лв/ед, Труд лв/ед, Общо/ед
Frontend displays provider badge (Rule/LLM) with confidence percentage
Frontend displays hourly rate badge (worker_type + rate + min. indicator)
Frontend displays internal price hint badge (Вътр.) when historical data available
'Добави N ред в офертата' button successfully adds lines to offer
seed_data_creation: Used existing draft offer OFF-0104 (9800fa3c-99b9-408d-9d51-822d33b6546a) for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Offer Module Phase 1 MVP fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/extra-works/ai-fast (instant rule-based), POST /api/extra-works/ai-refine (LLM-enhanced). Frontend: OfferEditorPage.js has AI dialog with multi-line input and editable proposals. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_ai_offer_module.py. Historical price data exists for: Мазилка, Шпакловка, Боядисване, Облицовка, Електро, Гипсокартон.

Backend POST /api/extra-works/ai-fast re.notes: Returns rule-based proposals with hourly_info, internal_price_hint is available when historical data exists

Backend POST /api/extra-works/ai-refine.notes: Returns LLM provider with higher confidence, includes internal_price_hint

Backend endpoints include hourly_info wi.notes: hourly_info contains: worker_type, hourly_rate, min_hours, min_job_price, min_applied

Frontend Offer Editor has 'AI помощ' but.notes: Button visible on Draft offers (data-testid='ai-assist-btn'), opens dialog

Frontend user can enter multiple work li.notes: 'Добави ред' button adds new input line with description, unit selector, qty input

Frontend 'Анализирай с AI' button produc.notes: Button triggers API call, displays results with editable fields

Frontend proposals show editable fields.notes: All fields are Input elements and editable in results phase

Frontend proposals show provider badge (.notes: Badge shows 'Rule 85%' or 'LLM 90%' depending on provider

Frontend 'Обратно към входа' button allo.notes: Button present with data-testid='ai-back-btn', text includes '(редактирай и пресметни отново)'

Frontend 'Добави N ред в офертата' butto.notes: Button click adds lines to offer table, dialog closes, table row count increases

Frontend after adding lines they appear.notes: Lines table updated from 2 rows to 3 rows, new line shows correct pricing

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - Real AI (rule-based fast + LLM refine)
